title: Unique Party 62081 - Lime Green Polka Dot Paper Straws, Pack of 10
features: Pack of 10 Lime Green Polka Dot Party Straws
Polka Dot Lime Green Paper Straws measure approximately 21cm (8.25") in length
Classic polka dot paper straws will top off party drinks in style at a picnic, garden party, BBQ, birthday party or fundraiser
Paper straws can also be used as simple cupcake toppers, cake banners, or placed in a mason jar for an easy table decoration
Search for other Lime Green Polka Dot party supplies and coordinating solid colour party decorations from Unique Party
description: Product Description Celebrate in classic polka dot style with these fun Lime Green Polka Dot Paper Straws. Featuring a classic lime green and white polka dot design, these eye-catching party straws are ideal at a picnic, garden party, BBQ, birthday party, fundraiser or other special occasion. Paper straws are a classic way to top off party drinks in style. They can also be used to make simple cupcake toppers or cake banners, or placed in a mason jar for an easy table decoration. Manufacturer's Description Celebrate in classic polka dot style with these fun Lime Green Polka Dot Paper Straws. Featuring a classic lime green and white polka dot design, these eye-catching party straws are ideal at a picnic, garden party, BBQ, birthday party, fundraiser or other special occasion. Paper straws are a classic way to top off party drinks in style. They can also be used to make simple cupcake toppers or cake banners, or placed in a mason jar for an easy table decoration. Box Contains 10 Green Polka Dot Paper Straws See more
